{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Three-Horned Eagle
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A [[Three-Horned Eagle]] is a threat that could rise out of the clouds.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
